## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**POHIST_HEAD** -> AR_TAX_TABLES (H_TAX_CODE->AUTH, H_TAX_CODE->ZONE); DEPARTMENTS (DEPARTMENT -> DEPT_ID); JOB_HEADER (JOB -> JOB); JOB_OPERATIONS (SEQUENCE -> SEQ); LANG_CODE (LANG_CD -> ISO_CODE); POHIST_VEND_BUY (PURCHASE_ORDER -> PURCHASE_ORDER); TAX_GROUP_RATE (H_TAX_CODE -> GRP_CD); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR)

**POHIST_LINES** -> AR_TAX_TABLES (LIN_TAX_CODE->AUTH, LIN_TAX_CODE->ZONE); INVENTORY_MSTR (BIN->BIN, LOCATION->LOCATION, PART->PART); INV_CROSS_REF (MFG_NAME->MFG_NAME, PART_MFG_NO->MFG_PART); JOB_HEADER (JOB->JOB, SUFFIX->SUFFIX); PL_MASTER (PRODUCT_LINE -> PROD_LINE); PO_H_LN_TEXT (LINE->LINE, PURCHASE_ORDER->PO_NUM); TAX_GROUP_RATE (LIN_TAX_CODE -> GRP_CD); UM_CODES (UM_INVENTORY->CODE, UM_PURCHASING->CODE)

**POHIST_PAY_TO** -> POHIST_VEND_BUY (PURCHASE_ORDER -> PURCHASE_ORDER)

**POHIST_VEND_BUY** -> POHIST_HEAD (PURCHASE_ORDER -> PURCHASE_ORDER)
